'''''Inquisitor''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I'']][[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|-class Star Destroyer]] used by [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] as his personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]].

==History==
The ''Inquisitor'' boarded the ''[[Seldom Different]]'' with a shuttle around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Taggert]] led the boarding team.

The ship served as home to [[Brenn Tantor]] as he underwent officer training in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Shuttling both the young officer and Brashin across the galaxy to trouble spots, it provided an orbital base of operations for many ground battles.

''Inquisitor'' was specially equipped to fill its role as the mobile command center of the Grand General. A noted technology aficionado, he had it equipped with a [[Battlefield Holographic Control Interface]] and loaded with unusual ground units such as [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]] and [[Tracked Shield Disabler|TR-SDs]] and a large array of complete prefabricated garrison buildings.

When Tantor defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Brashin tracked him to [[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]], where he was [[Mission to Trasse|attempting to steal]] an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]].

''Inquisitor'' appeared in the system as Tantor prepared to extract the walker. ''Inquisitor'' moved into position to cut off Tantor's escape, but was disabled when Tantor captured a [[planetary ion cannon]] and fired upon the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. ''Inquisitor'' was last seen drifting in the Trasse asteroid field as Tantor made his escape, but Brashin at least escaped the incident.

{{Ship-stub}}
